titleStmt.title: SII 5.1184: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1184. (A.R. No. 303 of 1896). ON THE TWELFTH PILLAR IN THE SAME MANDAPA, EAST AND NORTH FACES.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīśubhamastu śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1325 Aguṁ
nnēṁṭi svabhānusaṁvvatsara vaiśākha kriṣṇa 5 śukravārā
nanu śrīkūrmmarāyani sannidhini Akhaṁḍḍadīpamu
Ahçōrātramunnuveluṁganu pōṭnūri vīṭi veligala
ni Aruvaveluma kēśavāṁḍipiḷa koḍku nallaṁ jeṭṭipiḷaṁgā
ri koḍuku seṭipiḷaṁgāru tamaku Āyurārōgya
AIśvaryyābhivriddhiyunnuṁ butrapautrābhivriddhi
yunnu dhanadhānyasamriddhiyunnu Anavaratamunnu dēva
brāhmaṇaprasādamuṁ galugamā śrīkūrmmanāta
dēvarasannidhini niraṁttaramaina Akhaṁḍadīpamu
neliṁgiḍikoṟakai peṭṭina pratima Okkaṭi Īyyakha
ṁḍadīpānaku nētikai malle ciṁgabōIni koḍuku
lu Eṟṟebōyuṁḍunnu kommanabōyuṁḍunnu
Iddaṟu Annaṁdammula gōcarānaṁ beṭṭina go
ṛlelu nūṟu lekhā 100 I[A]khaṁḍānaku nityamunnu A
ḍḍanēti lekhanu Ēṁḍādiki puṭlu 4 tū 10 Ī lekhanu
pratisaṁvatsaramaṁdunnu neyi nagaraṁ decci kola
yaṁgalavāṁḍu Īyyakhaṁḍamu ĀcaṁdrārkasthāI
gānu naḍapanu tirupati śrīvaiṣṇavarakṣa śrī śrī śrīThe figure of a kettle-drum on a pillar is engraved below the.
Digital edition of SII 5.1184 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
